message:
Running command: # Check latest PnR run state
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/ | sort -V | tail -15
echo "==="
# Check for final directory (GDS/LEF output)
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/final/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No final dir"
# Check for any GDS output
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane -name "*.gds" 2>/dev/null | head -5
